title: Favorite Crossplosions
wikitext:
[]: Favorite Crossplosions             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Jul 16, 2015 3:55 pm What is your favorite moment in which an explosion takes the shape of the christian symbol? this can be from the series, the movies, the manga or even fanart

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Thu Jul 16, 2015 7:28 pm Definitely the "Shinji kills the world" scene from EoE, also known as the Red Earth Purification Ceremony. That whole scene was just fucking amazing.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jul 25, 2015 5:55 pm Yui crossploding the ruins of the Nerv pyramid open, with the explosion turning into energy wings.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Sun Jul 26, 2015 9:30 am The crossploding at the end of 2.0 that splits Zeruel in half. Unit 01 just sitting there in god mode like "im not even mad bro"
